name: io.github.VonderVuflya/yggdrasil
description: One shared, durable memory for your AI coding agents — local-first, zero-dependency.

environmentVariables.name: YGG_ENGINE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Yggdrasil engine HTTP API.

environmentVariables.name: YGG_ENGINE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for authenticating to the Yggdrasil engine (from ~/.yggdrasil/token after `ygg install`).
